name: Lucid Diagnostics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Lucid Diagnostics Inc. is a medical technology company focused on early cancer detection, primarily through its EsoGuard® Esophageal DNA Test, a non-endoscopic test for the early detection of esophageal precancer and cancer. The company aims to prevent deaths from esophageal adenocarcinoma through widespread screening and surveillance. Lucid Diagnostics is based in Scottsdale, Arizona.
